name: JDV MedSpa of Chattanooga
subject: re: the leads who don't book online
body:
Hi there,

Floating this back up in case it slipped by. Quick version: I set up a system that texts back the leads who call/DM/fill the form but don't book themselves — within 60 seconds, 24/7 — and gets them booked, plus auto review requests after visits. It recovers inquiries you're already paying to generate.

Worth a quick 15 min? https://cal.com/cyshek

Not a fit? Just reply "not now" — no hard feelings.

— Cyrus

Totally fine if it's not a fit — just reply "not now" and I'll leave you be.
